DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_ACCOUNT_ACTIVITY]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_ACCOUNT_ACTIVITY]
( 
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[EventType] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[TranslatedEventType] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[EventTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ObjectID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ObjectType] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ObjectName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ApplicationID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ApplicationName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Category] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ActorID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ActorName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[DateTimeInTimezone] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ExtraData] [nvarchar](512)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
